emails.subject: palo alto load for Oct
emails.body: palo alto load for Oct Jason, palo Alto is asking for their Oct load forcast today in order to realign their supplies. could you get this for me ASAP? Let me know if there is a problem. They are waiting on this to transact. Thanks, Kim
